# MemPalace Test Content

This is a test document about the Driftwood project authentication migration.

## Decision: Auth Migration to Clerk

The team decided to migrate from Auth0 to Clerk on 2026-01-15.
Kai recommended Clerk based on pricing and developer experience.
Maya is handling the migration implementation.

## Key Facts

- Project: Driftwood (SaaS analytics platform)
- Team lead: Priya
- Backend: Kai (3 years experience)
- Frontend: Soren
- Infrastructure: Maya
- Junior developer: Leo (started last month)
